kind: source-vein brain (multi-author TradingView open-source Pine script corpus, rules-only)
build_method: manual — distilled from the 2026-07-15 pine-facade harvest (25 curated scripts, verbatim rule extraction from strategy.entry/exit calls + input defaults); no mega-brain-ingest run (source is code, not transcripts)
authors: multi-author (LuxAlgo, fluxchart, Zeiierman, QuantCrawler, tbiktag, AlgoAlpha, fareidzulkifli, RicardoSantos, ChrisMoody, exlux99, plmnl01, spudow, BigBeluga, MrTuanDoan, Stable_Camel, Amjad_S, hiimannshu, wbburgin, MtxTrader, BlueChip Algos, TheBigDaddyMax lineage, zzzcrypto123)
mempalace_note: rg keyword search is the reliable recall path; point a live mempalace connection at this directory in a future session for semantic recall
standing_caveat: D-WEB — every rule is web-sourced: locally rebuild + honest-fill gauntlet before any money path; NO TradingView equity curve is evidence (instant-fill fantasy); agreeCount/likes = popularity proxy only, never edge
top_3_extractables: PINE-B2 rolling ADF unit-root test as the mean-reversion ON/OFF regime gate — a REGIME CLASSIFIER, not a strategy; the direct statistical test of the assumption every MR sleeve makes (Season-Engine shaped, top porting priority)

Two-phase re-entry archetypes wild-confirmed: OR-midpoint retest re-entry (PINE-A5, strip lookahead_on) and session-range sweep-fade (PINE-C4) — direct tests of the failed-first-touch -> re-entry thesis
Wild-consensus spec confirmations: NY OR = 09:30-09:45; RSI2 thresholds 5/95 with cross-OUT trigger; targets as OR-width fractions; gold session open 08:20 ET

other_files._README.md: brain profile, D-WEB frame, when-to-consult/skip, recall pattern
other_files.pine-harvest-2026-07-15-distilled.md: vein mechanics, fill-realism trap taxonomy, wild-consensus parameters, archetype taxonomy (ORB gates / two-phase re-entry / MR regime gates / session sleeves), porting law
